nonBlockingIssues.description: abortControllerRef is assigned but never used — no abort logic implemented. Dead code that could confuse future maintainers.
No useEffect cleanup for timerRef. If component unmounts while a feedback/error timer is pending, setState will be called on unmounted component.
CSS class overlap: cursor-pointer and cursor-not-allowed both present when loading. While CSS cascade resolves it correctly, it would be cleaner to conditionally apply.
Error message exposes internal html2canvas error details. A generic message would be safer.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated architecture.md to document ShareOnSocial component, html2canvas dependency, and forwardRef pattern on Board.tsx
